query:
SELECT 
  j.id, j.userId, j.songTitle, j.artistName, j.audioUrl, j.audioKey, j.lyrics,
  j.style, j.mood, j.duration, j.aspectRatio, j.renderQuality, j.enableLipSync,
  j.status, j.finalVideoUrl,
  c.id as charId, c.name as charName, c.role as charRole, c.slotIndex,
  c.masterPortraitUrl, c.previewImageUrl, c.lockedDescription, c.characterMode,
  c.enableLipSync as charLipSync, c.isLocked, c.bodyBuild,
  c.lockedOutfit, c.lockedProps, c.lockedRole, c.lockedRules,
  c.characterVisualDetails, c.previewApproved
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN videoCharacters c ON c.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510098;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT 
  j.id, j.userId, j.songTitle, j.artistName, j.audioUrl, j.audioKey, j.lyrics,
  j.style, j.mood, j.duration, j.aspectRatio, j.renderQuality, j.enableLipSync,
  j.status, j.finalVideoUrl,
  c.id as charId, c.name as charName, c.role as charRole, c.slotIndex,
  c.masterPortraitUrl, c.previewImageUrl, c.lockedDescription, c.characterMode,
  c.enableLipSync as charLipSync, c.isLocked, c.bodyBuild,
  c.lockedOutfit, c.lockedProps, c.lockedRole, c.lockedRules,
  c.characterVisualDetails, c.previewApproved
FROM musicVideoJobs j
LEFT JOIN videoCharacters c ON c.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.id = 510098;
